THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAM, JOE DAM, KIMBERLY LAO, PHUONG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 221 - 8TH AVE, S.F. $2,300.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,300.00, STAYED UNTIL MAR-31-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO POSSESSION. SECURITY DEPOSIT HANDLED ACCORDING TO LAW. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS INCL 1542CC.
